role: Open Sentinel-1 derived interferograms coherence and unwrapped phase
no_auth_route: CEDA public archive for registered and non-registered users
primary_use: Main no-auth InSAR product inventory and downloadable products
limitations: Coverage is non-uniform and frame-based; not a complete global subsidence product

role: Cloud-native conversion of official EGMS point products
no_auth_route: Public Source Cooperative HTTP object
primary_use: Fast programmatic European benchmark for ground motion exposure analysis
limitations: Third-party conversion; must cite and check original Copernicus EGMS license

role: Official European Ground Motion Service
no_auth_route: EGMS Explorer download
primary_use: Official source and citation basis for EGMS data
limitations: Official site says download through Explorer; programmatic bulk route may be less direct

role: California statewide TRE Altamira InSAR displacement points rasters and reports
no_auth_route: California Open Data and DWR GIS services
primary_use: Strong no-auth groundwater-subsidence pilot and validation benchmark
limitations: California only; processed contractor product with DWR caveats

role: Groundwater level elevation observations
no_auth_route: USGS OGC API no login
primary_use: Mechanism validation for US pilots
limitations: Irregular well sampling and changing site composition; not causal alone

role: Daily and monthly rainfall/drought forcing
no_auth_route: Public CHC HTTP files
primary_use: Drought and precipitation controls
limitations: Quasi-global 50S-50N; version transition to CHIRPS v3 must be tracked

role: Population exposure
no_auth_route: WorldPop REST/API no authentication up to rate limit
primary_use: Population exposure and socioeconomic consequence layer
limitations: Rate limits without API key; cite exact product version

role: Built-up area settlement population and urban layers
no_auth_route: EU/JRC direct download page
primary_use: Built environment and settlement exposure
limitations: Product selection/version must be fixed before analysis

role: Global irrigation and groundwater-irrigation fraction maps
no_auth_route: FAO AQUASTAT direct downloads
primary_use: Groundwater irrigation demand proxy
limitations: Coarse 5 arc-min resolution and static historical baseline

role: Road rail bridge port airport and other infrastructure proxies
no_auth_route: Geofabrik public OSM extracts
primary_use: Infrastructure exposure layer
limitations: ODbL attribution and derived-database obligations must be respected

role: Global GNSS MIDAS station velocities and station coordinates
no_auth_route: Nevada Geodetic Laboratory public text products
primary_use: Sparse independent vertical-motion anchors for cross-region validation
limitations: Station density is sparse and reference-frame effects must be handled; not a pixel-level InSAR truth product

role: Japan nationwide urban deformation data derived from Sentinel-1 LiCSAR and LiCSBAS
no_auth_route: Zenodo public record and file API
primary_use: Non-US open urban deformation benchmark and data-product extension
limitations: Derived from LiCSAR/LiCSBAS so it is not independent truth; large 28.7 GB record requires selective download

role: Global built-up surface grid at 100 m and 1 km with multitemporal epochs
no_auth_route: JRC GHSL public download and GEE catalogue
primary_use: Area-weighted built-up exposure and settlement-growth covariate
limitations: Needs equal-area overlay and exact resolution/epoch selection before manuscript claims

role: Global AI-derived building footprints from Bing imagery
no_auth_route: Microsoft open building footprint download
primary_use: Building-footprint exposure layer for area/asset counts where GHSL is too coarse
limitations: Very large vector dataset; imagery dates vary by region and must be tracked

role: Open Buildings 2.5D Temporal building presence counts and height
no_auth_route: Google Earth Engine and Google Cloud public dataset
primary_use: Building-count and height exposure for Global South candidate regions
limitations: Coverage excludes parts of Europe/North America; access route may use GEE or cloud storage

role: Nationwide Iran land-subsidence rate seasonal-amplitude and mask from Sentinel-1 InSAR 2014-2020
no_auth_route: Zenodo public record and file API
primary_use: No-token high-impact nationwide subsidence raster for arid groundwater benchmark extension
limitations: Published Science Advances companion dataset; not independent truth and overlaps groundwater-subsidence literature

role: Database of subsidence in 143 major coastal cities
no_auth_route: Zenodo public record and Excel download
primary_use: Context and city-selection prior for no-token global screening
limitations: Compiled literature database rather than gridded deformation evidence

role: Japan GEONET daily coordinates and GNSS products
no_auth_route: GSI public information with foreign-researcher FTP application route
primary_use: Potential dense independent Japan GNSS benchmark if FTP access is granted
limitations: Not strict no-token for foreign researchers because access requires application with IP address

role: Global Sentinel-1 GRD cloud-optimized GeoTIFF archive
no_auth_route: AWS open data no-account listing per registry
primary_use: Amplitude/backscatter and acquisition-availability support; not phase InSAR
limitations: GRD is not enough for subsidence phase retrieval; requester-pays details can vary

role: OPERA Sentinel-1 displacement product
no_auth_route: Earthdata OAuth data body
primary_use: High-value North America validation if credentials are available
limitations: Requires free Earthdata login for data body; violates strict no-auth execution on current machine

role: ARIA Sentinel-1 geocoded unwrapped interferograms
no_auth_route: Earthdata OAuth data body
primary_use: High-value global validation if credentials are available
limitations: Requires free Earthdata login for data body; not primary under no-authorization rule
